title: Penny Arcade Sneaks
excerpt: Here's a look at some of what I created with Studio Calico 's Penny Arcade kits. They go on sale to subscribers at noon EST on June 27 and everyone else at midnight. I have to say that I really…
body:
Here's a look at some of what I created with Studio Calico's Penny Arcade kits. They go on sale to subscribers at noon EST on June 27 and everyone else at midnight. I have to say that I really enjoyed creating with these kits - the colors and whimsical feel really inspired me.

I designed a stamp set for the Spun Sugar Add-On, which I am so excited to share with all of you.Become a subscriber and get in on all the benefits and rewards that Studio Calico has to offer!
